claim_text: Maximum grain weight about 4 weeks after flowering (up to 12 weeks in cool areas)

value.raw_value_text: The maximum weight occurs about 4 weeks after flowering in Kansas. This period is determined largely by temperature and can extend up to 12 weeks in areas where the weather is cool.

geo_evidence.claim_location_text: The maximum weight occurs about 4 weeks after flowering in Kansas. This period is determined largely by temperature and can extend up to 12 weeks in areas where the weather is cool.
geo_evidence.source_location_text:
